headline: The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights Atmos Energy, Colgate-Palmolive and West Pharmaceutical Services
summary: Dividend Aristocrats like Atmos Energy, Colgate-Palmolive and West Pharmaceutical Services offer steady income as geopolitical tensions and oil price spikes rattle markets.

headline: Will CEO Succession and Chair Role Debate Reshape West Pharmaceutical’s Governance Story (WST)?
summary: In early March 2026, West Pharmaceutical Services announced that long-time President, CEO and Board Chair Eric M. Green plans to retire in the second half of 2026, reaffirmed its February 12, 2026 guidance, and later received a shareholder proposal seeking to permanently separate the CEO and Chair roles, which the company urged investors to vote against at its May 4, 2026 annual meeting. This combination of a planned leadership transition, strong Q4 2025 results with reaffirmed guidance, and...
